name: Szechuan Noodles#1
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups bok choy, chopped and blanched
2 cups cucumbers, peeled and sliced (or shredded)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the ingredients for the seasoning sauce and mix until smooth.
2. Heat the peanut oil in a wok over medium-high heat for 1 minute.
3. Stir-fry the pork until browned.
4. Add green onion, bok choy, and seasoning sauce. Stir-fry until the sauce comes to a boil.
5. Carefully pour into a warm large bowl and set aside.
6. Bring water to a boil in a heavy 5-quart pot.
7. Add noodles and cook until tender. Drain and divide into 6 portions in 6 small bowls.
8. Spoon meat sauce over the noodles.
9. Garnish with carrots, cucumber, and bean sprouts. Sprinkle with minced garlic.
10. Toss lightly and serve. Makes 6 servings. Hot bean sauce, a typical Szechuan seasoning, gives these noodles a special flavor.
